data.content: Now I'll build in both Debug and Release configurations with binlogs, in parallel:

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-3f1e0907fd094365b788296ed43bdfd0 && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:debug.binlog 2>&1", "description": "Build Debug with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-3f1e0907fd094365b788296ed43bdfd0 && dotnet build -c Release /bl:release.binlog 2>&1", "description": "Build Release with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}
